original_statement: what is the last stadium listed on this chart?
mutated_statement: what is the last something shown on this content?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Verb substitution + Context generalization: "stadium"→"something" (specific noun → vague placeholder) | "listed"→"shown" (list-specific verb → general display verb) | "this chart"→"this content" (specific visual "chart" → broad "content") (what is the last stadium listed on this chart? → what is the last something shown on this content?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的说明（“The table’s last row (Wigan Warriors) has the city/area entry ‘wigan, greater manchester.’ … This matches the Prediction Answer.”）可见agent直接将变异问题解释为表格最后一项并给出具体答案“wigan, greater manchester”。日志中没有出现任何关于问题模糊、不明确或需要澄清的表述，也未向用户提问或表示不确定。agent按自己的假设直接检索并返回结果，符合“未意识到指令模糊”的定义，因此归类为无法意识到指令模糊。
